mapper.select:
SELECT wl.work_log_code AS "workLogCode", i.issue_code AS "issueCode", i.title AS "issueTitle", p.project_code AS "projectCode", p.project_name AS "projectName", i.type_code AS "typeCode", t.type_name AS "typeName", u.user_code AS "workerCode", u.name AS "workerName", TO_CHAR(wl.work_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "workDate", wl.spent_minutes AS "spentMinutes", wl.description AS "description" FROM work_logs wl JOIN issues i ON i.issue_code = wl.issue_code JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = i.project_code JOIN users u ON u.user_code = wl.worker_code LEFT JOIN types t ON t.type_code = i.type_code
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM vw_user_auth va WHERE va.project_code = p.project_code AND va.user_code = #{loginUserCode} )
AND wl.work_date >= TO_DATE(#{from}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND wl.work_date < TO_DATE(#{to}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
ORDER BY wl.work_log_code DESC

SELECT wl.work_log_code AS "workLogCode", wl.issue_code AS "issueCode", i.title AS "issueTitle", p.project_code AS "projectCode", p.project_name AS "projectName", i.type_code AS "typeCode", t.type_name AS "typeName", wl.worker_code AS "workerCode", u.name AS "workerName", TO_CHAR(wl.work_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "workDate", wl.spent_minutes AS "spentMinutes", wl.description AS "description" FROM work_logs wl JOIN issues i ON i.issue_code = wl.issue_code JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = i.project_code JOIN users u ON u.user_code = wl.worker_code LEFT JOIN types t ON t.type_code = i.type_code WHERE wl.issue_code = #{issueCode} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM vw_user_auth va WHERE va.project_code = p.project_code AND va.user_code = #{loginUserCode} ) ORDER BY wl.work_date DESC, wl.work_log_code DESC
SELECT i.issue_code AS "issueCode", i.project_code AS "projectCode", i.assignee_code AS "assigneeCode" FROM issues i WHERE i.issue_code = #{issueCode}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(wl.work_log_code), 0) + 1 FROM work_logs wl
INSERT INTO work_logs ( work_log_code, issue_code, work_date, worker_code, spent_minutes, description ) VALUES ( #{workLogCode}, #{issueCode}, #{workDate}, #{workerCode}, #{spentMinutes}, #{description} )
mapper.select: SELECT wl.work_log_code AS "workLogCode", wl.issue_code AS "issueCode", i.title AS "issueTitle", p.project_code AS "projectCode", p.project_name AS "projectName", i.type_code AS "typeCode", t.type_name AS "typeName", wl.worker_code AS "workerCode", u.name AS "workerName", TO_CHAR(wl.work_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "workDate", wl.spent_minutes AS "spentMinutes", wl.description AS "description" FROM work_logs wl JOIN issues i ON i.issue_code = wl.issue_code JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = i.project_code JOIN users u ON u.user_code = wl.worker_code LEFT JOIN types t ON t.type_code = i.type_code WHERE wl.work_log_code = #{workLogCode} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM vw_user_auth va WHERE va.project_code = p.project_code AND va.user_code = #{loginUserCode} )

SELECT wl.work_log_code AS "workLogCode", wl.issue_code AS "issueCode", wl.worker_code AS "workerCode", i.project_code AS "projectCode", i.assignee_code AS "assigneeCode" FROM work_logs wl JOIN issues i ON i.issue_code = wl.issue_code WHERE wl.work_log_code = #{workLogCode}
mapper.update: UPDATE work_logs SET work_date = #{workDate}, worker_code = #{workerCode}, spent_minutes = #{spentMinutes}, description = #{description} WHERE work_log_code = #{workLogCode}
mapper.select:
SELECT p.project_code AS "projectCode", p.project_name AS "projectName",
NVL(t.type_code, 0) AS "groupKey", NVL(t.type_name, '-') AS "groupName",
0 AS "groupKey", '-' AS "groupName",
u.user_code AS "groupKey", u.name AS "groupName",
i.issue_code AS "issueCode", i.title AS "issueTitle",
SUM(wl.spent_minutes) AS "minutes"
FROM work_logs wl JOIN issues i ON i.issue_code = wl.issue_code JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = i.project_code JOIN users u ON u.user_code = wl.worker_code LEFT JOIN types t ON t.type_code = i.type_code
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM vw_user_auth va WHERE va.project_code = p.project_code AND va.user_code = #{loginUserCode} )
AND p.project_code = #{projectCode}
AND i.type_code = #{typeCode}
AND wl.worker_code = #{workerCode}
AND i.title LIKE '%' || #{issueTitle} || '%'
GROUP BY p.project_code, p.project_name,
t.type_code, t.type_name
0
u.user_code, u.name
, i.issue_code, i.title
HAVING SUM(wl.spent_minutes) >= #{minMinutes}
ORDER BY p.project_name
